summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Supplier Management Module for PharmaCare. All 13 backend API tests passed. All 10 frontend UI features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts rendering warning during initial load, does not affect functionality

backend: GET /api/suppliers returns list of suppliers with is_active field
Search suppliers by name works correctly
Search suppliers by phone works correctly
POST /api/suppliers requires mandatory name field (422 without name)
POST /api/suppliers creates new supplier with is_active=true by default
GET /api/suppliers/{id}/summary returns purchase summary (total_purchases, total_purchase_value, last_purchase_date)
DELETE /api/suppliers/{id} blocked with 400 error when purchases exist
Deactivated supplier NOT returned in active_only=true query
Purchase page uses active_only=true for supplier dropdown
All supplier CRUD operations require authentication
frontend: Supplier list displays with Status column (Active/Inactive badges)
Search by supplier name filters list correctly
Search by phone number filters list correctly
Add Supplier dialog opens with mandatory name field marked with *
Edit Supplier dialog pre-fills existing supplier data
View Supplier Details dialog shows Purchase Summary (Total Purchases: 9, Total Value: ₹8,295, Last Purchase: 2/10/2026)
Toggle status (Deactivate) changes badge to Inactive with success toast
Toggle status (Activate) changes badge back to Active with success toast
Delete supplier blocked with error toast: 'Cannot delete supplier: 9 purchase(s) exist. Deactivate instead.'
Deactivated supplier NOT shown in Purchase page supplier dropdown (only 'Test Supplier 062001' shown when 'Abinash Distributors' deactivated)

critical_code_review_comments: Suppliers.js correctly implements all CRUD operations with proper data-testid attributes
Backend DELETE endpoint properly checks for existing purchases before allowing deletion
PATCH toggle-status endpoint correctly toggles is_active field
PurchaseNew.js correctly fetches only active suppliers using ?active_only=true parameter
seed_data_creation: None - used existing suppliers: 'Abinash Distributors' (9 purchases) and 'Test Supplier 062001'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Management Module fully tested and working. Features verified: Supplier list with Status column, Search by name/phone, Add/Edit/View supplier dialogs, Toggle status (activate/deactivate), Delete protection when purchases exist, Deactivated suppliers excluded from Purchase page dropdown. Two suppliers exist: 'Abinash Distributors' (9 purchases, ₹8,295 total) and 'Test Supplier 062001'. Test user: testadmin@pharmacy.com/admin123
